sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to excite tumults and seditions in the State, to upset, unsettle

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a derivative of G450 (in the sense of removal); properly to drive out of home, that is, (by implication) to disturb (literally or figuratively): - trouble, turn upside down, make an uproar.
